title: gonolobus suberosus
intro: Gonolobus suberosus, also known as the "hairy gourd vine" or "prickly gourd", is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gonolobus suberosus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
